log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Aarakocra — Armored Tank (3 attacks).

→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 20] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 15 damage. Aarakocra — Armored Tank HP: 44/59
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 25 damage. Aarakocra — Armored Tank HP: 19/59

REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Aarakocra — Armored Tank --- HP: 23/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Aarakocra — Armored Tank --- HP: 23/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
Unknown action type: cast_healing_word
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
